# Fernando Prada

> AI Architect & Tech Lead at Devoteam (Spain). Specialist in multi-agent systems, RAG architectures, and production AI solutions. Building intelligent systems with Azure OpenAI, LangChain, FastAPI, and React.

## About

Fernando Prada is an AI Architect and Tech Lead based in Zaragoza, Spain, currently working at Devoteam. His career path is unique: from the Spanish Armed Forces to artificial intelligence systems architecture. He designs and builds production-grade AI systems including multi-agent orchestration, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, and conversational AI platforms. His technical stack spans Azure OpenAI, LangChain, LangGraph, FastAPI, React, and TypeScript. He holds the Microsoft Azure AI Engineer Associate certification.

## Key Links

- [Portfolio](https://fernandoprada.com): Personal portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and professional experience
- [About](https://fernandoprada.com/#about): Background — from the Spanish Armed Forces to AI Architecture
- [Projects](https://fernandoprada.com/#projects): Featured AI and software engineering projects in production
- [Skills](https://fernandoprada.com/#skills): Technical skills and competencies
- [Contact](https://fernandoprada.com/#contact): Get in touch or schedule a call

## Products

- [Impuestify](https://impuestify.com): AI-powered tax assistant that helps users navigate Spanish tax obligations using RAG, multi-agent systems (CoordinatorAgent, TaxAgent, PayslipAgent), and GPT-5-mini. Compliant with EU AI Act and GDPR. 95%+ accuracy on verified tax queries.
- [OpoGuardia](https://opoguardia.com): Intelligent exam preparation platform for Spanish civil service exams (oposiciones de Guardia Civil) with AI-generated adaptive practice tests, RAG-powered tutoring, and multi-tenant support for academies. 60% reported reduction in preparation time.

## Professional Experience

- **Tech Lead & AI Architect** at Devoteam Drago SAU (May 2025 – Present): Leading AI projects and enterprise solution architecture. Multi-agent systems, RAG with Azure OpenAI, technical team leadership.
- **IT Department Manager** at Grupo SVAN (Jul 2024 – May 2025): Led digital transformation, built AmazonIA (e-commerce sync bot) and AI Technical Support Assistant.
- **Professional Soldier** in Spanish Army (Oct 2016 – Feb 2024): 7+ years of service developing leadership, discipline, strategic planning, and high-pressure decision making.

## Expertise

- Multi-agent systems (LangGraph, LangChain, custom orchestration)
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines
- Azure OpenAI Service and GPT integration
- Production AI security (Llama Guard, prompt injection protection, PII detection)
- EU AI Act and GDPR compliance for AI systems
- FastAPI backend development
- React + TypeScript frontend
- Cloud architecture (Azure, Vercel, Railway)
- Conversational AI and chatbot design
- Tech leadership and solution architecture

## Certifications

- Azure AI Engineer Associate (Microsoft, Dec 2025)
- Generative AI with Azure OpenAI & Semantic Kernel (Microsoft Applied Skills, Jan 2026)
- NLP with Azure AI Language (Microsoft Applied Skills, Jan 2026)
- Azure AI Fundamentals (Microsoft, Jul 2025)
- AI Engineer Level 3 (Devoteam, Dec 2025)
